• Skills  
(O>  
Original Melody  
Randomly deals 3 times 62 piercing damage, each time stealing 13 temporary strength from the target.  
"Frenzy Eruption" Select one non-consumable and non-derivative command card in hand that does not have "Melody," and add "Reverberating Melody."  
A Reverberating Melody: After playing, it takes effect an additional time, but "Reverberating Melody" turns into "Charged Melody."  
▲ Charged Melody: After playing, Hamlin gains 3 points of Frenzy.  
Final Sonata  
Each time damage is dealt, randomly apply one wonderful negative effect to the target, additionally select one non-consumable and non-derivative command card with "Melody" to add "Reverberating Melody."  
▲ Wonderful Negative Effect: 150% Bleed / 75% Poison / 1 Layer Weakness / 1 Layer Vulnerability / 20 Points Temporary Strength Reduction.  
This Song Deserves Praise  
3  
Hamlin gains 50 points of Frenzy.  
Spiritual Awakening  
Spiritual Awakening: At the start of the turn, place 1 "Symphony of Cooperation" into hand.  
Symphony of Cooperation  
Derived Buff Card.  
Buff Card  
Choose: "Ascending" or "Descending Sound." Retain, consume.  
"Ascending":  
The next non-derived command card you play has a power cost +2, taking effect 2 times.  
"Descending Sound":  
The next non-derived command card you play has a power cost -2.  
Soul Prelude  
3 Randomly deals 3 times 38 piercing damage, each time has a 50% chance to randomly apply one wonderful negative effect to the target. If the power cost is 0 when played, deal an additional 2 times damage.  
Retain, prepare 1.  
Command Card  
Recollection Rondo  
3  
Gain 5 points of strength, place 2 "Inspiration" into hand.  
Command Card Can be forcibly played even when power is insufficient, changing to placing 2 "Inspiration" into the draw pile.  
Strike  
1  
Deal 25 damage. Hamlin gains 10 points of Frenzy.  
Strike  
Defense  
4 Gain 24 shield. Hamlin gains 10 points of Frenzy.  
Defense  
Spirit Awakening  
Mental Concerto  
"Strike" and "Defense" gain 13 points of temporary strength.  
If it triggers the "Melody" effect, the gained temporary strength is doubled.  
Dream Waltz  
"Reverberating Melody" reduces the power cost of the granted cards by -2.  
Moonlight Reverie  
After triggering the "Melody" effect, Hamlin gains 1% critical rate and critical damage.  
For every 10 triggers, increase the damage count of "Soul Prelude" and "Original Melody" by 1 in this battle, up to a maximum of 2 times.
